hero.heading: Where Nature Meets Design
hero.sub: Transforming outdoor spaces into living works of art. We bring your garden vision to life with care, craft, and decades of expertise.

about.title: Professional Landscaping Across Adelaide's South
paragraphs: At Maddern's Place Garden & Landscaping, we deliver professional landscaping services across Hackham, Morphett Vale, and the wider Adelaide southern suburbs. Whether you're upgrading your front yard, building a retaining wall, or laying premium turf, we create stunning, functional outdoor spaces tailored to your needs.
As a trusted landscaping business in Adelaide, we specialise in:

With a strong focus on residential and commercial landscaping, we pride ourselves on attention to detail, reliable communication, and high-quality workmanship. Every project is managed with care to ensure your outdoor area not only looks great but adds real value to your property.
If you're searching for landscapers near me, turf installation in Adelaide, or irrigation experts in Hackham, you're in the right place.
bullets: New turf installation (Kikuyu, Sir Walter, and more)
Irrigation systems using Hunter MP Rotators and Bluetooth NODE timers

services.title: Lawn Care & Mowing
services.desc: Keep your lawn lush, healthy, and immaculate year-round. Our regular maintenance programs include mowing, edging, fertilisation, and seasonal treatments for a lawn that always looks its best.

services.title: Garden Design
services.desc: Our designers collaborate with you to create a garden that reflects your style and suits your lifestyle. From cottage gardens to contemporary escapes, we design spaces that delight the senses.

services.title: Landscaping
services.desc: Complete outdoor transformations by Madderns Place Garden & Landscaping. We specialise in block retaining walls, turf installation, irrigation systems, drainage solutions, and tailored planting. From concept through to completion, we manage every stage of the project with clear communication and minimal disruption to your home.

services.title: Irrigation Installation & Repair
services.desc: Irrigation installation, upgrades, and repairs — designed for efficient water use and healthy lawn growth. From new system setups to fault finding and repairs, we ensure your watering system works exactly as it should.

process.title: Consultation
process.desc: We meet on site to understand your vision, assess levels, drainage, access, and discuss practical solutions that suit your property and budget.

process.title: Design & Quote
process.desc: We develop a clear plan for your project — outlining materials, layout, and scope — followed by a detailed, transparent quote.

process.title: We Get to Work
process.desc: Our team completes the landscaping works efficiently and professionally, keeping disruption to a minimum and maintaining clear communication throughout.

process.title: Enjoy Your Garden
process.desc: Once complete, you're left with a refreshed, functional outdoor space ready to enjoy. We provide guidance to help you maintain it properly moving forward.

chat.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm the Maddern's Place assistant. Ask me anything about our landscaping services, or I can get someone to call you with a free quote!
chat.systemPrompt:
You are a friendly assistant for Maddern's Place Garden & Landscaping, a professional landscaping company based in Hackham, Adelaide, South Australia.

Services offered:
- Landscape design and construction
- Turf installation (Kikuyu, Sir Walter, and more)
- Retaining wall installation
- Irrigation systems (Hunter MP Rotators, Bluetooth NODE timers)
- Lawn care and mowing
- Gutter vacuum cleaning

Service area: Hackham, Morphett Vale, and wider Adelaide southern suburbs.
Phone: 0459 119 149
Email: maddernsplace@gmail.com
Hours: Mon–Fri, 8am–6pm
Pricing: All jobs are individually quoted — we offer free, no-obligation quotes.

Keep responses short, warm and conversational (under 80 words). Don't make up prices.

IMPORTANT: In your very first reply, after briefly answering the visitor's question, ask for their name in a natural, friendly way (e.g. "By the way, what's your name?"). Use their name in all subsequent replies once you have it.

When someone wants a quote or is clearly interested in a service, ask for any remaining details: phone number, suburb, and what they need. Once you have name, phone, suburb, and service, respond with ONLY this JSON on its own line (no other text after it):
<LEAD>{"name":"...","phone":"...","suburb":"...","service":"..."}</LEAD>
